testcase.name: test_user_language_is_french

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected fr-BE, got None assert None == 'fr-BE' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf932939669c0>('language') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf932939669c0> = {'session_token': 'a5baada5-b8b5-435f-853b-b058d7d32b0f', 'user': {'auth_provider': 'email', 'country': 'BE', 'created_at': '2026-04-10T15:00:58.184256+00:00', 'data_sharing': True, ...}}.get + where {'session_token': 'a5baada5-b8b5-435f-853b-b058d7d32b0f', 'user': {'auth_provider': 'email', 'country': 'BE', 'created_at': '2026-04-10T15:00:58.184256+00:00', 'data_sharing': True, ...}} = <test_multi_doc_features.TestFrenchTranslations object at 0xf932939267d0>.user

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_multi_doc_features.py:228: in test_user_language_is_french assert self.user.get('language') == 'fr-BE', f"Expected fr-BE, got {self.user.get('language')}" E AssertionError: Expected fr-BE, got None E assert None == 'fr-BE' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf932939669c0>('language') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf932939669c0> = {'session_token': 'a5baada5-b8b5-435f-853b-b058d7d32b0f', 'user': {'auth_provider': 'email', 'country': 'BE', 'created_at': '2026-04-10T15:00:58.184256+00:00', 'data_sharing': True, ...}}.get E + where {'session_token': 'a5baada5-b8b5-435f-853b-b058d7d32b0f', 'user': {'auth_provider': 'email', 'country': 'BE', 'created_at': '2026-04-10T15:00:58.184256+00:00', 'data_sharing': True, ...}} = <test_multi_doc_features.TestFrenchTranslations object at 0xf932939267d0>.user
